characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, light brown complexion. He has short, curly dark hair and a light beard/stubble. He wears round, wire-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Olive green short-sleeved t-shirt and light blue jeans.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Wanna know a secret?
[Wanna know a secret?]
Character A says: English बोलना उतना मुश्किल नहीं है जितना लगता है।
[Speaking English isn't as hard as it seems.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable, casual opening.
- Introduces the core problem (English speaking feels hard) but immediately offers reassurance.
- Sets a warm, conversational tone right from the kitchen counter.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Wanna know a secret?
English बोलना आसान है।

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Supernova के bite-sized lessons और AI tutor के साथ, रोज़ practice करो।
[With Supernova's bite-sized lessons and AI tutor, practice daily.]
Character A says: Beginners हों या interview की तैयारी करने वाले...
[Whether beginners or those preparing for an interview...]
Character A says: हमारा AI tutor सबको confidence देता है।
[Our AI tutor gives confidence to everyone.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Showcases the app interface and core features (AI tutor, daily practice).
- Highlights the target audience (beginners, job seekers).
- Focuses on the emotional payoff: building confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Bite-sized lessons
AI tutor practice
Builds confidence

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: Great try! Now let's say it with a bit more confidence.
[Great try! Now let's say it with a bit more confidence.]
Character A says: ये AI tutor गलतियों पर टोकता नहीं, बड़े भाई की तरह सिखाता है।
[This AI tutor doesn't scold you for mistakes, it teaches like an older brother.]
Character A says: And yeah, it's super practical.
[And yeah, it's super practical.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the AI tutor's encouraging, non-judgmental feedback.
- Uses the visual humor of the tongs to keep the ad light and engaging.
- Emphasizes the practical, real-world utility of the app without mentioning price.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Great try!
Teaches like an older brother.
Super practical.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: अब आपकी बारी।
[Now it's your turn.]
Character A says: Download Supernova today and start speaking.
[Download Supernova today and start speaking.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a direct, empowering call to action.
- Ends on a high-energy, positive note from a comfortable living room setting.
- Reinforces the brand name and the primary goal (start speaking).
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
अब आपकी बारी।
Download Supernova today.
